article_meta.title: Shopping These Giant Yankee Candles are 40% off before Valentine's Day By Miska Salemann Published Feb

reasoning: Strong identification of author-prose hype without attributing quotes; minor labeling quibbles and a few missed promotional phrases.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are in the author’s own voice; no quoted reviewer text was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each item reflects genuine promotional spin/emotionalism in the author’s prose.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed other clear hype like 'You were smart and planned ahead,' 'perfect candle to set the mood,' and 'has your Valentine's vibe completely handled.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are mostly reasonable; one could argue Word Choice/Sensationalism instead of Spin for item 1 and Word Choice rather than Subjective Qualifying Adjectives for 'swoon.'
